name: Innofactor Oyj
summary: Innofactor Oyj provides digitalization and cloud solutions that focus on Microsoft platforms in the Nordic countries. It develops software products and services; and offers planning services for business-critical solutions, project deliveries, implementation support, and maintenance services. The company offers Dynasty 10, a software suite for information management processes; Innolog, a solution for monitoring of personal data files and log data management in the healthcare, and social services sectors; Membership Management System solution for customer relationship and operations management for trade unions and membership-based organizations; Prime, a solution that optimize and manage organizations resources; QualityFirst, a quality and management software suite; Skilli, a cloud-based learning analytics solution; and solutions for managing courses, events, and conferences. It also provides solutions in the areas of service design, websites and mobile apps, digital customer service and marketing automation, customer relationship management, enterprise resource planning, project and portfolio management, quality and management, case and document management, HR and talent management, digital collaboration and mobile work, cloud infrastructure, governance, security and GDPR, identity and access management, enterprise mobility and security, managed cloud services, advanced analytics and BI, and Internet of Things, as well as customized solutions. Innofactor Oyj was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Espoo, Finland.
